title: Note verbale d'adhésion du Ministère des Affaires étrangères d'Estonie

The Rep…

pages.text:
Minister of Foreign Affeirs

Peepuble of Estonia

Tallinn, october 11, 1993

Dear sir,

I have the honour to advise you that the Republic of Estonia

State Assembly (Riigikogu) ratified on September 21, 1993 and the

President of the Republic of Estonia promulgated on October 4, 1993 the Law on the Ratification of the Convention for

the

establishment of the European and Mediterranean Plant Protection organization.

The Republic of Estonia has decided to become a member of the

European and Mediterranean Plant Protection Organization, as a

Government invited by the EPPO Council in conformity with

Article III, a. 2. of the EPPO Convention.

The Right Honourable Minister of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of France

Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of France

Head of Political Affairs

United Nations and International Organizations Service 37 Quai d'Orsay 75700 PARIS

1...2.

The Government of the Republic of Estonia has examined the EPPO convention and Rules of Procedure and agrees to contribute to the working costs of the organization under the conditions stated in Article XVIII of the Convention and also its

Schedule I.

The official delegate of the Republic of Estonia to EPPO will be the Estonian State Plant Quarantine Inspection Director,

Mr. Ülo SAAMERE.

I remain,

yours faltniully,

Tamar das

Trivimi Velliste
